response.justification: Candidate has broad full-stack experience across many languages and domains, but the role requires 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows with SQL Server/Oracle and fixed-income/capital-markets domain knowledge. Only one short C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~7 months, 2014-2015) is evident, with no recent C++ work, no Windows-platform focus, and no financial-services or fixed-income experience. SQL is listed generically with no SQL Server or Oracle specifics.
strengths: Strong overall software engineering breadth across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development
Communication abilities evidenced by workshops, talks, and teaching engagements
concerns: Lacks the required 5-10 years of hands-on C++ experience; only ~7 months at National Instruments
No Windows-platform C++ focus and no SQL Server/Oracle experience shown
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
